# Deepak Products

> Sheet metal stamping and brass components manufacturer in Jamnagar, Gujarat, India. Established 1985 by Rasikbhai K. Bhut. ISO 9001:2015 certified (D-U-N-S 65-081-4762, NSIC SE3B). One stop solution for sheet metal and brass components, serving 700+ clients across 10+ countries.

## Company facts
- Name: Deepak Products
- Founded: 1985
- Founder: Rasikbhai K. Bhut
- Location: Plot No 4219, Road-F, G.I.D.C. Phase-III, Dared, Jamnagar 361005, Gujarat, India
- Certifications: ISO 9001:2015, D-U-N-S 65-081-4762, NSIC SE3B
- Phone: +91 96627 13385, +91 88667 51091
- Email: sales@deepakproducts.com
- Finished products: 650+ | Clients: 700+ | Countries served: 10+
- Export markets: India, UK, UAE, USA, Australia, Germany, Italy, Singapore

## Products
- MCB Parts: https://deepakproducts.com/products/mcb-parts
- Brass Electrical Components: https://deepakproducts.com/products/brass-electrical-components
- Modular Socket Parts: https://deepakproducts.com/products/modular-socket-parts
- Modular Switch Parts: https://deepakproducts.com/products/modular-switch-parts
- Crimping Lugs: https://deepakproducts.com/products/crimping-lugs
- Brass Turned Components: https://deepakproducts.com/products/brass-turned-components
- Brass Earth Tags: https://deepakproducts.com/products/brass-earth-tag
- Brass Hex Nuts & Bolts: https://deepakproducts.com/products/brass-hex-nuts-bolts
- Brass Moulding Inserts: https://deepakproducts.com/products/brass-moulding-inserts
- Sheet Metal Components: https://deepakproducts.com/products/sheet-metal-components
- Customized Components: https://deepakproducts.com/products/customized-components

## Industries served
Automobile, Electrical, Telecommunication, Hardware & Locks, Home Appliances, Sanitary & Plumbing, Health Care
